reviews.author: Dakshit Oberoi
reviews.body: Thunder design aur gold tone ka combination bahut attractive lagta hai. Stylish aur premium dono feel ek saath milte hain.

reviews.author: Avni Pahuja
reviews.body: Har baar ise pehenne par log notice karte hain. Design bahut eye-catching hai aur personality ko bold touch deta hai. ✨

reviews.author: Vihaan Tandon
reviews.body: Daily wear ke liye ekdum perfect pendant hai. Lightweight hone ki wajah se pura din comfortably pehen sakte hain.

reviews.author: Yuvraj Chhabra
reviews.body: Is pendant ka thunder shape bahut different hai. Roz pehenne ke liye comfortable hai aur quality bhi kaafi impressive lagi. 😊

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
The Thunder Pendant is made for girls who love jewellery that feels bold, energetic, and stylish. Inspired by the power of lightning, its sharp thunderbolt design with soft green detailing and polished gold outline creates a look that feels edgy, aesthetic, and beautifully feminine.

Crafted with a 24K gold tone plated finish, this handcrafted pendant adds a luxurious shine to your everyday and occasion wear looks. It comes with a 45 cm VELORE Snake Chain, also 24K gold tone plated, giving the necklace a smooth, premium fall around the neckline.

Lightweight, anti-tarnish, and skin-friendly, this pendant is designed especially for feminine styling. It is perfect for girls who love jewellery that feels cool, confident, playful, and effortlessly stylish without being too loud.

Styling Tip: Pair it with a crop top, oversized shirt, denim outfit, pastel co-ord set, or casual dress for a trendy feminine look with an energetic thunder charm.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Set: 24K Gold Tone Plated Pendant and chain.

Finish: Premium and luxurious Shine.

Design Style: Minimalist, elegant, and versatile.

Fit Type: Lightweight for all-day wear.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
• Skin-friendly metal alloy

• 24K gold tone plating

• Anti-tarnish protective coating

• VELORE Snake Chain

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
• Skin-Friendly Wear

Designed to feel comfortable on the skin, making it easy to wear for daily use and special occasions.

• Anti-Tarnish Finish

Helps maintain the shine of the pendant and chain with proper care.

• Premium Gold Tone Look

The 24K gold tone plated finish gives the jewellery a rich, stylish, and luxurious appearance.

• Easy to Style

Pairs beautifully with western, ethnic, casual, party, and festive outfits.

• Lightweight Comfort

Comfortable to wear for long hours without feeling heavy around the neck.

• Perfect for Feminine Styling

Adds a soft, elegant, and aesthetic touch to your overall look.
